title: Ancient Icarus myth reimagined at ‘The Rebirth’ edition
description: On a calm evening at Katina's Kafé, on Friday, May 8, a room full of young artists, writers, performers, and professionals sat quietly as a fictional radio talk show unfolde...

title: Spokesman invokes ancient Persian victory to warn enemies
description: TEHRAN, May 11 (MNA) – Iranian Foreign Ministry Spokesman Esmaeil Baghaei invoked a historic Persian military triumph over the Roman Empire, saying history repeats itself for those who fail to learn from its lessons.

title: 8-year-old boy discovers ancient statuette in southern Israel
description: Israeli boy stumbles on 1,700-year-old artifact during family outing near the Ramon Crater in southern Israel. The post 8-year-old boy discovers ancient statuette in southern Israel appeared first on World Israel News .

title: Boy hiking in Ramon Crater was looking for a show-and-tell object, he found an ancient statuette
description: Dor, 8, was on a trip with families of reservists in the Ramon Crater when he noticed an unusual stone on the ground; The Israel Antiquities Authority discovered that it is a fragment of a 1,700-year-old statuette from the Roman period

title: Boy finds ancient Roman treasure on show-and-tell hunt in southern Israel
description: Dor Wolynitz, 8, was hiking with families of reservists in the Ramon Crater when he spotted an unusual stone, later identified as a fragment of a 1,700-year-old statuette
